# frame

**Instance Property**

The frame of the element in the screen’s coordinate space.

## Declaration

```swift
var frame: CGRect { get }
```

## Size

- **horizontalSizeClass**: The horizontal size class of the element.
- **verticalSizeClass**: The vertical size class of the element.
- **XCUIElement.SizeClass**: The user interface size classes you can inspect in a UI test.
